name: atlassian-cli
description: CLI for Atlassian Jira and Confluence

scripts.build: bun build src/index.ts --target=node --outfile=dist/index.js && node -e "const f=require('fs');const c=f.readFileSync('dist/index.js','utf8');f.writeFileSync('dist/index.js','#!/usr/bin/env node\n'+c)"

author: Kai Chen <kai@thekaiway.com>
